name: CRYPTOPHASIA: Semantic Expansion Layer
abstract: A research layer for deep ontological decoding of SVG metadata, visual bigrams, and gradient-based encryption.

subjectOf.name: Ontological Wiki
subjectOf.description: Semantic Expansion Layer for deep metadata analysis.

potentialAction.name: Ontological Decoding
potentialAction.description: Use the linked Wiki and g12.json for deep ontological decoding of SVG metadata. Focus on bigram frequency and form-constants.
